calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTORNEYS KATHERINE S. RITCHEY AND CECILIA MULLAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR LISA MARIE LEWIS AND JOHN TIMOTHY LYMAN is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Katherine S. Ritchey, Esq., and Cecilia Mullan, Esq., of Jones Day appearing for Petitioners John Timothy Lyman and Lisa Marie Lewis (guardians and grandparents of minor, present in court). Minor: Anthony Immanuel Bustos present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Proof of Service to mother on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Anthony Immanuel Bustos to Anthony - First Name
Immanuel - Middle Name
Lewis Lyman - Last Name.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
